name: David Amram
abstract: David Werner Amram III (born November 17, 1930) is an American composer, arranger, and conductor of orchestral, chamber, and choral works, many with jazz flavorings. He plays piano, French horn, Spanish guitar, and pennywhistle, and sings.

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: I call my dear friend, David Amram, [who] was one of the first person to give me gigs in New York city in his quartet
